mdRecord.dcterms:title: Fiduciary Accounts: Guardianship of Arthur Duncan
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Guardianship of Arthur Duncan Greenberry Duncan, Guardian, Until he resigned during the February 1898 term of the Floyd County Court Recorded in Ledger Book 4 page 496, in the Floyd County Courthouse.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Court Records
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
